ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer placing the order */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "company_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company agent handling the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the order */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of shipment (e.g., express, standard) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "total_weight" TEXT /* Total weight of the shipment */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES shipment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES shipment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the agent is responsible for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the order status (e.g., shipped, in transit, delivered) */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is a final status (e.g., delivered, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipment type (e.g., express, standard) */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipment type is insured */,
  "min_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Minimum number of days for delivery */,
  "max_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code for the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "customs_regulations" TEXT /* Summary of customs regulations for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order that was updated */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* The agent who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_histories_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_histories_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order the action was taken on */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., order created, order cancelled) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* The agent who performed the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_actions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_actions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "is_super_user" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has superuser privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
